descriptionHtml:
Jeanneau Sun Odyssey 49i | 4 Cabins Version | Tax Not Paid

If you are considering a spacious and comfortable cruising yacht, the Jeanneau Sun Odyssey 49i for sale 2008 presents a well-maintained and inviting option. With professional ownership and the Greek flag, she is designed for safe and enjoyable passages whether you’re heading out with family, friends, or as part of a charter business. The yacht is in good condition and benefits from ongoing care, with several key upgrades in recent years.

Specifications

  • Model: Jeanneau Sun Odyssey 49i
  • Year Built: 2008
  • Yacht Type: Sail
  • Length Over All (LOA): 14.80 m
  • Beam: 4.5 m
  • Draft: 1.8 m
  • Cabins: 4 Double
  • Berths: 8
  • Heads: 4
  • Onboard Capacity: 10
  • Fuel Tank: 240 litres
  • Water Tank: 615 litres
  • Engine: Yanmar 75hp, 4,900 hours
  • Flag: Greek
  • VAT Status: Not paid
  • Ownership: Professional

Recent Upgrades

  • Furling Mainsail: New (2023)
  • Furling Genoa: New (2022)
  • Saloon Upholstery: New (2023)
  • Bimini: Replaced (2019)
  • Sprayhood: Replaced (2019)
  • Solar Panels: Installed
  • Teak Deck on Cockpit

Navigation and Deck Equipment

  • GPS: Garmin
  • Plotter: Yes
  • Autopilot: Yes
  • Steering Wheels: 2
  • Deck Shower: Yes
  • Electric Fridge: Yes
  • Cockpit Table and Cushions: Yes

Entertainment and Comfort

  • Sound System: Radio, MP3 player, cockpit speakers
  • Outboard Engine: Yes
  • Dinghy: Yes

The Jeanneau Sun Odyssey 49i for sale 2008 is notable for its four double cabins and four heads, providing ample space and convenience for up to ten people onboard. The wide beam and generous saloon make for comfortable living and socialising, and the recently updated saloon upholstery offers a fresh, welcoming atmosphere below deck. The cockpit is fitted with teak, adding to both comfort and aesthetic appeal, and is covered by an upgraded bimini and sprayhood, both replaced in 2019 to ensure protection from the elements.

The Jeanneau Sun Odyssey 49i for sale 2008 stands out as a capable and comfortable sailing yacht, well-suited for coastal cruising, family holidays, or professional charter use. Her current condition, regular upgrades, and professional ownership make her ready for sailing adventures. For those seeking a reliable yacht with space and modern comforts, she is an appealing choice available for viewing and further enquiry.
